channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Norway's Johannes Klæbo is new Winter Olympics king
item.description: Johannes Klaebo won all six cross-country skiing events at this year's Winter Olympics, the surpassing Eric Heiden's five golds in 1980.

item.title: A Post-Katrina Law Guards FEMA Resources. Why Hasn’t It Stopped Noem?
item.description: A key statute was designed to rein in the Homeland Security secretary and prevent deadly mistakes. Lawyers say its provisions are difficult to enforce...

item.title: Trump Says He Will Raise Global Tariff to 15 Percent
item.description: The move signaled that the president would press ahead with steep global import taxes despite the legal setback from the Supreme Court.

item.title: Vietnam Veterans sue to block proposed 'Independence Arch' near Arlington National Cemetery
item.description: The lawsuit challenges President Trump's plans for "Independence Arch," a 250-foot structure proposed for Memorial Circle.

item.title: The Queen Stuck by Prince Andrew. King Charles Is Pulling Away
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the former prince, is getting no help from the throne as the crisis over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein intensifies.

item.title: JPMorgan Admits to Debanking Trump After Jan. 6 Capitol Attacks
item.description: Nation’s largest bank, in response to a lawsuit filed by the president, confirmed his longstanding complaint about “debanking.”

item.title: Trump to raise global tariffs to 15%
item.description: President Trump previously said he would implement 10% global tariffs after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down his tariff policies.

item.title: Mississippi health system shuts down clinics statewide after ransomware attack
item.description: The attack was launched on Thursday and prompted hospital officials to close all of its 35 clinics across the state.

item.title: Blizzard conditions and high winds forecast for NYC, East coast
item.description: The winter storm is expected to bring blizzard conditions and possibly up to 2 feet of snow in New York City.

item.title: Blizzard Warnings Issued for Swath of East Coast, Including NYC
item.description: The blizzard warnings are the first since 2017 for New York City. Forecasters said the city is expected to get up to 18 inches of snow, with two feet ...

item.title: Klaebo Makes Olympic History: Unforgettable Photos from 6-Gold Sweep
item.description: Johannes Klaebo won his sixth cross country gold medal at the 2026 Olympics.

item.title: The Queen Stuck by Prince Andrew. King Charles Is Pulling Away
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the former prince, is getting no help from the throne as the crisis over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein intensifies.

item.title: For Dutch speedskater, age doesn’t matter.
item.description: Jorrit Bergsma, a gold medalist back in 2014, is now 40. But he rolled back the years to win gold.

item.title: At Least 10 Killed in Lebanon, Officials Say, After Israel Strikes Hezbollah
item.description: The Lebanese militant group said eight of its members were among those killed late Friday. The attacks threaten to further destabilize an already tenu...

item.title: Young Skaters Assist With Figure Skating Competitions While Aspiring to the Olympics
item.description: Young skaters known as flower kids jump into action. They have their own Olympic dreams.
